title: Please can we get Timely Time Tracking as a direct integration?
excerpt: I need a time tracker that can track all my time in the background and then I drag it into tasks at the end of the day like Timely. PLease can we get this added. I’ve tried via Zapier and it’s a massive pain

posts.author: Carla_Atom (Carla Shaw)
posts.cookedHtml: I need a time tracker that can track all my time in the background and then I drag it into tasks at the end of the day like Timely. PLease can we get this added. I’ve tried via Zapier and it’s a massive pain
